backend/main.mo: Motoko canister implementing access-controlled user profiles, balances, quotes, and USDC→GOLD swaps with admin rate updates.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the multi-wallet UI update to specific frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of key frontend files related to styles, swap UI components, and hooks.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base layer defining OKLCH color tokens and light/dark theme variables for global styling.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file mounting the React app and loading the main entry script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Wraps the SwapPage with theme support and a global notification toaster.
frontend/src/features/swap/components/Ba: Displays authenticated users’ USDC and GOLD balances with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/features/swap/components/Pr: Modal prompting authenticated first‑time users to save a name to their profile.
frontend/src/features/swap/components/Qu: Shows the current backend-provided USDC→GOLD exchange rate with loading state.
frontend/src/features/swap/components/Sw: Form allowing authenticated users to enter USDC, preview GOLD output, and execute swaps with validation.
frontend/src/features/swap/components/Wa: Provides wallet login/logout UI with Internet Identity support and placeholder MetaMask option, handling authentication state and provider selection.
frontend/src/features/swap/hooks/useSwap: Defines React Query hooks for fetching user profile, balances, quotes, and performing swap and deposit mutations via the backend actor.
frontend/src/features/swap/SwapPage.tsx: Main swap screen composing wallet controls, balances, swap form, quote preview, and profile setup flow.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the authenticated or anonymous backend actor based on Internet Identity, invalidating related queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements authentication context and provider for Internet Identity, handling login, logout, identity loading, and status tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets global Tailwind layers, custom color variables, dark mode palettes, and base styling utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, then renders App.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL parameters and session-stored parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, fonts, animations, and enabling plugins such as typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Contains the project’s state: feature list, new requests, architectural notes, and metadata for building a swap page supporting wallet connections and USDC→GOLD swaps.
